gotchas.title: Older roofs may switch to actual cash value (ACV)
gotchas.body: Some carriers reduce payouts on aging roofs from replacement cost to actual cash value after a stated age threshold. Photograph and document roof condition while healthy; read your declarations and roof endorsement.
gotchas.source: Common homeowners policy pattern (carrier-specific). Educational — not insurance advice.
gotchas.regionNote: Varies by carrier, state, and endorsement.

gotchas.title: Sewer/sump backup often needs a rider
gotchas.body: Standard policies frequently exclude or tightly limit water backup / sump overflow. If you have a basement, ask explicitly about water-backup coverage limits and deductibles.
gotchas.source: Common HO-3 style exclusion pattern. Educational only.
